mapper.insert: INSERT INTO film ( wikidata_qid, slug, judul, title_eng, tahun_rilis, jenis, deskripsi, catatan, durasi, negara_asal, original_language, color, poster_url, image_urls, trailer_url, followed_by, part_of_series ) VALUES ( #{wikidataQid}, #{slug}, #{judul}, #{titleEng}, #{tahunRilis}, #{jenis}, #{deskripsi}, #{catatan}, #{durasi}, #{negaraAsal}, #{originalLanguage}, #{color}, #{posterUrl}, #{imageUrls}, #{trailerUrl}, #{followedBy}, #{partOfSeries} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM film ORDER BY tahun_rilis DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM film WHERE judul ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' OR title_eng ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM film WHERE judul ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' OR title_eng ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO film_genre (film_id, genre) VALUES (#{filmId}, #{genre}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT genre FROM film_genre WHERE film_id = #{filmId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO person (wikidata_qid, name, slug, photo_url, description) VALUES (#{wikidataQid}, #{name}, #{slug}, #{photoUrl}, #{description}) ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO film_person (film_id, person_id, role) VALUES (#{filmId}, #{personId}, #{role}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM film_person WHERE film_id = #{filmId} AND role = #{role}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company (wikidata_qid, name, slug, logo_url, description) VALUES (#{wikidataQid}, #{name}, #{slug}, #{logoUrl}, #{description}) ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO film_production_company (film_id, company_id) VALUES (#{filmId}, #{companyId}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO film_distributor (film_id, company_id) VALUES (#{filmId}, #{companyId}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.wikidata_qid, c.name, c.slug, c.description, c.logo_url FROM company c JOIN film_production_company fpc ON fpc.company_id = c.id WHERE fpc.film_id = #{filmId} ORDER BY fpc.id
SELECT c.id, c.wikidata_qid, c.name, c.slug, c.description, c.logo_url FROM company c JOIN film_distributor fd ON fd.company_id = c.id WHERE fd.film_id = #{filmId} ORDER BY fd.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO film_location (film_id, type, location) VALUES (#{filmId}, #{type}, #{name})
INSERT INTO film_alias (film_id, alias, language) VALUES (#{filmId}, #{alias}, #{language}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
